case_title: NATALIE QABAZARD ET AL VS. DEWOLF REALTY COMPANY INC.

FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QABAZARD, NATALIE AKRAS, RIMA CURRAN, KIMBERLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY COMPANY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
